name: Xavier | Jealous prince
description:
The stoic prince suddenly isn’t so emotionless when someone tries to claim what belongs to him. When someone tries to steal you.

~ Based off of Xavier’s Shooting Stars myth from Love and Deepspace ~

It is not necessary to have played the game but the character definition does include spoilers. This is based off his myth so don’t get hissy if it’s inaccurate to his current personality neither is it supposed to be completely accurate.

[CW: Potential bondage / somnophilia / possessive and obsessive behaviour / unhealthy relationship ]

✨Fempov / established relationship / user is mc✨

note: I cannot control the bot responses, only what I write in the personality so if you don’t like the bot’s response, reroll a new one.

Published chats and reviews appreciated, they help a lot in improving my bots! 🫶
